name: Portobella Mushrooms Parisian
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup fat-free chicken or vegetable broth
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the broth, butter-flavor sprinkles, garlic seasoning, and lemon juice.
2. Place the mushroom halves in a shallow dish and spoon the mixture over each half, as well as the sliced bell pepper and onion.
3. Marinate for 20 to 30 minutes.
4. Grill over medium-hot coals until the mushrooms are tender. Brush with additional mixture for added flavor.
5. Serve on grilled rolls. If desired, top with Dijon mustard mixed with an additional 1/2 teaspoon garlic seasoning and sliced tomatoes.
